OP ADD 1 1
NCHECKS 1
NBITS 2
PIVOT_MAP 0
SPRIME 0

ENDTEST

TEST rep_code_n5_syndrome_tests

OP ADD_EXTRA 2 1 1 1 0
OP ADD_EXTRA 3 0 1 1 1 0
OP ADD_EXTRA 4 0 0 1 1 1 0
OP ADD 4 0 0 0 1
OP SET_S 4 1 0 0 0
CHECK_ISVALID 1
OP SET_S 4 0 1 0 0
CHECK_ISVALID 1
OP SET_S 4 0 0 0 0
CHECK_ISVALID 1
NCHECKS 4
NBITS 5
PIVOT_MAP 0 1 2 3
SPRIME 0 0 0 0
ZCOUNT 1
Z 1 1 1 1 1
ISVALID 1
ENDTEST

TEST merge_no_connect
C1 ADD_EXTRA 1 1 1 0
C1 ADD_EXTRA 2 1 1 1 0
C1 ADD 2 0 1
C2 ADD_EXTRA 1 1 1 0
NCHECKS 3
NBITS 4
PIVOT_MAP 0 1 3
SPRIME 0 0 0
ZCOUNT 1
Z 1 1 1 0
ISVALID 1
ENDTEST

TEST merge_one_connect
C1 ADD_EXTRA 2 1 1 2 0 0
C2 ADD_EXTRA 2 1 1 2 0 0
CONNECT 4 0 1 1 0
NCHECKS 4
NBITS 3
PIVOT_MAP 0 2 1 -1
SPRIME 0 0 0 0
ZCOUNT 0
ISVALID 1
ENDTEST

TEST merge_two_connect
C1 ADD_EXTRA 1 1 1 0
C2 ADD_EXTRA 1 1 1 0
CONNECT 2 1 1
CONNECT 2 1 1
NCHECKS 2
NBITS 4
PIVOT_MAP 0 1
SPRIME 0 0
ZCOUNT 2
Z 1 1 1 0
Z 1 1 0 1
ISVALID 1
ENDTEST

TEST merge_with_syndrome
C1 ADD_EXTRA 1 1 1 1
C2 ADD_EXTRA 1 1 1 1
CONNECT 2 1 1
NCHECKS 2
NBITS 3
PIVOT_MAP 0 1
SPRIME 1 1
ZCOUNT 1
Z 1 1 1
ISVALID 1
ENDTEST

TEST merge_large
C1 ADD_EXTRA 1 1 1 0
C1 ADD_EXTRA 2 1 1 1 0
C1 ADD_EXTRA 3 0 1 1 1 0
C1 ADD 3 0 0 1
C2 ADD_EXTRA 1 1 1 0
C2 ADD_EXTRA 2 1 1 1 0
C2 ADD 2 0 1
CONNECT 5 0 0 1 1 0
NCHECKS 5
NBITS 8
PIVOT_MAP 0 1 2 4 5
SPRIME 0 0 0 0 0
ZCOUNT 3
Z 1 1 1 1 0 0 0 0
Z 0 0 0 0 1 1 1 0
Z 1 1 1 0 1 0 0 1
ISVALID 1
ENDTEST
